programs.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programs.desc: Tania and Tia rescue a sick dog from the streets; Chong's health deteriorates as his cancerous tumor continues to grow; Tia works on a long-distance adoption.

programs.title: Louisiana Law
programs.desc: Wildlife agents join a manhunt for an armed fugitive on the bayou; a nervous young hunter reveals a serious violation; a night shrimping bust leads to a familiar and unrepentant culprit.

programs.title: Louisiana Law
programs.desc: When wildlife agents find an alligator with a fresh bullet wound to the head, nearby anglers are the prime suspects; an injured hunter must be evacuated by helicopter; agents use drones to track crabbers selling their catch across state lines.

programs.title: Louisiana Law
programs.desc: The search is on for a missing boater who may have suffered a stroke on Corney Lake; wildlife agents deploy as a hurricane makes landfall, rescuing stranded survivors from the floodwaters and dispensing lifesaving supplies.

programs.title: Louisiana Law
programs.desc: As a storm rolls in over St. Tammany Parish, Cpl. Blaine Wagner and Cpl. Rick Clark assist in a search-and-rescue mission for a missing fisherman; agents confront a repeat offender for harassing hunters, and a felon is caught with an illegal firearm.

programs.title: Louisiana Law
programs.desc: In Jackson Parish, a reckless hunter is investigated for shooting down a highway; agents stake out a man suspected of two illegal deer kills; duck hunters are confronted for harassment; a crowded boat parade ends with citations.
